\tzpentry{ID4352}{Torus Curv Ratio Inner Outer Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4352 introduces Torus Curv Ratio Inner Outer Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:torus-curv-ratio} \frac{|K_{\text{inner}}|}{K_{\text{outer}}} ;=; \frac{R + r}{,R - r,},, \end{equation}
